# Motivair (Schneider Electric) — CDU for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-30

## Ownership
- **Acquired by Schneider Electric** — February 2025, $850M
- Now operates as Schneider Electric's liquid cooling division
- Global service network + EcoStruxure integration
- HQ: Buffalo, NY (retained post-acquisition)

---

## MCDU-10 — NVL72 Reference Design CDU
- **4U rack-mounted** CDU (fits in standard rack bay)
- **Capacity:** 210 kW per rack
- **Format:** ORV3 compatible + NVL72 fit
- **Reference design:** Co-engineered with NVIDIA for GB300 NVL72 racks
- **On NVIDIA RVL/AVL:** Confirmed
- Tight integration with EcoStruxure IT for monitoring and alerts

## MCDU-70 (Flagship — Larger Deployments)
- 2,500 kW per unit
- Scalable to 10 MW+ with centralized controls
- Dual heat exchangers
- Designed for NVIDIA DSX Blueprint
- Announced January 2026

## ChilledDoor RDHX
- Up to 75 kW/rack rear-door heat exchanger
- For hybrid retrofit of existing air-cooled facilities

## ADC Stack Integration
- MCDU-10 = per-rack CDU option for NVL72 (alternative to CoolIT CHx2000 row-level approach)
- Row-level vs per-rack tradeoff: MCDU-10 = simpler plumbing, CoolIT CHx2000 = fewer units to manage
- Schneider EcoStruxure integrates with Eaton power monitoring — unified facility ops view

## Product page: motivaircorp.com/products/CDU/
